original_image_tags: Top right corner shows a distribution routing slip with names: Mr. Tolson, Mr. Ladd, Mr. Clegg, Mr. Gladden, Mr. Rosen, Mr. Tracy, Mr. Harbo, Mr. Belmont, Mr. Mohr, Tele. Room, Mr. Nease, Miss Gandy. Handwritten checkmarks and initials appear next to names.

elements.description: A typed teletype message from the FBI Denver field office to the FBI Director dated March 9, 1950, regarding flying saucer claims. The page contains typed body text and standard document structure with no embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

A red stamped header at the top of the page reading 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE COMMUNICATIONS SECTION MAR - 9 1950 TELETYPE'. Below this is a red routing slip stamp with a list of names including Mr. Tolson, Mr. Ladd, and Mr. Belmont, with handwritten initials next to some names.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence and general content of the routing slip, including key names (Tolson, Ladd, Belmont), but they disagree on the exact list of names quoted.
